news.title: Lamina: o novo restaurante de Vasco Coelho Santos em Lisboa aposta no fogo e na memória - Mesa Marcada
news.summary:
# Summary

Vasco Coelho Santos, a renowned Portuguese chef, has opened a new restaurant called **Lamina** in Lisbon that emphasizes fire-based cooking techniques and culinary nostalgia. The restaurant focuses on dishes prepared with fire as a central element, combined with memory-inspired cuisine. Visitors to Lisbon interested in innovative Portuguese gastronomy and chef-driven dining should consider Lamina as a destination for a unique dining experience centered on these distinctive cooking methods and storytelling through food.

news.title: Considerado "o melhor leitão de Portugal", este icónico restaurante da Bairrada instala-se em Lisboa durante 4 dias - Lisboa Secreta
news.summary:
# Summary

A legendary Bairrada restaurant famous for what's considered Portugal's best roasted suckling pig is opening a temporary 4-day pop-up location in Lisbon. This is a rare opportunity for Lisbon visitors to experience this iconic regional specialty without traveling to the Bairrada region. Food enthusiasts and those seeking authentic Portuguese cuisine will want to take advantage of this limited-time dining experience.

news.title: Com o Lamina, Vasco Coelho Santos aposta em Lisboa (e traz a famosa rabanada) - Público
news.summary:
# Summary

Chef Vasco Coelho Santos has opened a new restaurant called Lamina in Lisbon, bringing his signature dish, the famous rabanada (Portuguese French toast), to the city. This is a significant expansion for the chef, marking his entry into Lisbon's competitive dining scene. Visitors to Lisbon should care because they now have the opportunity to try this chef's renowned rabanada and his cuisine at this new establishment.

news.title: Lisbon Bar Show regressa a Lisboa a 19 e 20 de maio com México como país convidado - tnews.pt
news.summary:
# Summary

The Lisbon Bar Show, a major bartending and mixology event, is returning to Lisbon on May 19-20 with Mexico as the featured guest country. The event showcases cocktail culture, bartending techniques, and spirits from around the world. Visitors to Lisbon interested in craft cocktails, mixology trends, or experiencing innovative drinks should mark these dates as a key event to explore the city's bar scene and international bartending talent.

news.title: Cartões bancários de gestor de restaurante de luxo raptado usados em Lisboa - cmjornal.pt
news.summary:
# Summary

A luxury restaurant manager was kidnapped, and his bank cards were subsequently used in Lisbon. This incident highlights serious security concerns that could affect both restaurant staff and customers visiting high-end dining establishments in the city. Visitors should be aware of such criminal activity in the area, though this appears to be an isolated incident targeting management rather than diners.
